Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aethril]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Aethril is a type of being that can be mistaken for having silver hair and eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Aethril are a people who resemble frail humans with pale blue skin and starlight hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The Aethril grow synapse nodes in multi-dimensional gardens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Aethril are part of the Union.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — The Aethril continued talking throughout the video.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Progenitor Aethril may take human form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Aethril is a race or group that includes Fateweaver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — The Temporal Prism originated from the Aethril.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Aethril are beings or entities that use plants for terraforming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Aethril is a type of being or substance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — The Aethril are a species whose home world has everything sculpted from magic.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Aethril is a substance that can be seen by the Visiri third eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Aethril is a species with powder blue skin and hair that glistens like stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Aethril are one of the five species of intelligent beings in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — The Aethril left behind a spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Aethril can see magic directly.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Progenitors are associated with the Aethril.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
